item.title: Retirement: End of lift reminder of HBv2/HC-Series/NP-Series Azure Virtual Machine in Azure Batch Pool
[Launched] Generally Available: Encrypt Premium SSD v2 and Ultra Disks with Cross Tenant Customer Managed Keys
[In preview] Public Preview: Azure Site Recovery support for Windows Azure VMs with NVMe disk controllers.
[Launched] Announcing: Minimum billable object size for cooler storage tiers
[Launched] Generally Available: Smart Tier (Azure Blob and Data Lake Storage)

[In preview] Public Preview: Managed identity support for graphical session recording

[In preview] Public Preview: Event Grid as a destination for Stripe events now in Public Preview

[In preview] Public Preview: Rule impact analysis on Azure Network Watcher
Retirement: Python support for Azure App Service and Azure Functions on Windows will be retired on March 31, 2027
Retirement: AzureDnsEndpoints for Azure storage accounts will be retired March 2027
Retirement: Service Fabric support for Windows Server 2022 ends on March 31, 2027 - upgrade to Windows Server 2025
Retirement: Service Fabric support for Windows Server 2019 ends on March 31, 2027 - upgrade to Windows Server 2025
